mapper.select: SELECT SYSNAME AS sysname, MODEL AS equipType, TID AS ip FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST WHERE MODEL LIKE '%6300%'
SELECT TID AS sysname, SYSTEM_NAME AS sysnameName FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_SIPC

SELECT TID, SYSNAME, PSU, MODEL, SID, SW_VER, SW_CHKSUM, SW_DATE, SW_TIME FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST_YD EXCEPT SELECT TID, SYSNAME, PSU, MODEL, SID, SW_VER, SW_CHKSUM, SW_DATE, SW_TIME FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST

insert.if:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_EQUIP_SLOT ( SYSNAME, SLOT, P_UNIT, P_PORTS, ACT, STATE, DEGREE, RX_DEGREE, TX_DEGREE, AD_SIDE, CURRENT_UNIT, CURRENT_PORTS, PAIR_SLOT, NET_TYPE ) VALUES
( #{item.sysname}, #{item.slot}, #{item.pUnit}, #{item.pPorts}, #{item.act}, #{item.state}, #{item.degree}, #{item.rxDegree}, #{item.txDegree}, #{item.adSide}, #{item.currentUnit}, #{item.currentPorts}, #{item.pairSlot}, #{item.netType} )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIA.TB_EQUIP_OPC (SYSNAME, MRSA_SLOT, UNIT, LAMBDA, PORT, ADD_SOURCE, DROP_ADDRESS) SELECT SYSNAME, MRSA_SLOT, UNIT, LAMBDA, PORT, ADD_SOURCE, DROP_ADDRESS FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_OPC_YD

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY_TMP WITH NETWORK_DATA AS( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU, ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY SID) AS NUM FROM( SELECT DISTINCT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_NETWORK_YD ) A ), NETWORK_DATA_A AS ( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, 'A' AS GB, NUM FROM NETWORK_DATA ), NETWORK_DATA_Z AS ( SELECT P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU, 'Z' AS GB, NUM FROM NETWORK_DATA ), NETWROK_DISTINCT_DATA AS ( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU FROM( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU FROM NETWORK_DATA_A UNION ALL SELECT P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU FROM NETWORK_DATA_Z ) A ), NETWORK_SEP_DATA AS ( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, GB, NUM FROM( SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, GB, NUM FROM NETWORK_DATA_A UNION ALL SELECT P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU, GB, NUM FROM NETWORK_DATA_Z ) A ) SELECT A.SID||'--'||Z.SID AS LINK_ID, A.SID, A.AID_BAU, A.AID_PAU, Z.SID, Z.AID_BAU, Z.AID_PAU, 'ROADM' FROM( SELECT A.SID, A.AID_BAU, A.AID_PAU , (SELECT X1.GB FROM NETWORK_SEP_DATA X1 WHERE A.SID = X1.SID AND A.AID_BAU = X1.AID_BAU AND A.AID_PAU = X1.AID_PAU ORDER BY NUM LIMIT 1) AS GB , (SELECT X1.NUM FROM NETWORK_SEP_DATA X1 WHERE A.SID = X1.SID AND A.AID_BAU = X1.AID_BAU AND A.AID_PAU = X1.AID_PAU ORDER BY NUM LIMIT 1) AS NUM FROM NETWROK_DISTINCT_DATA A ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.SID, A.AID_BAU, A.AID_PAU , (SELECT X1.GB FROM NETWORK_SEP_DATA X1 WHERE A.SID = X1.SID AND A.AID_BAU = X1.AID_BAU AND A.AID_PAU = X1.AID_PAU ORDER BY NUM LIMIT 1) AS GB , (SELECT X1.NUM FROM NETWORK_SEP_DATA X1 WHERE A.SID = X1.SID AND A.AID_BAU = X1.AID_BAU AND A.AID_PAU = X1.AID_PAU ORDER BY NUM LIMIT 1) AS NUM FROM NETWROK_DISTINCT_DATA A ) Z ON A.NUM = Z.NUM AND A.GB = 'A' AND Z.GB = 'Z' WHERE Z.SID IS NOT NULL
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY SELECT LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU, EQUIP_TYPE FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY_TMP
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY SELECT LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SHELFA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, SHELFZ, PTPNAMEZ FROM NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY_TMP

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY_TMP WITH NNI_TOPOLOGY AS ( SELECT TRUNK_ID , SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_A , '/', 1)||'-'||SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_A , '/', 2),'-',1) AS SYSNAMEA, SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_A , '/', 2),'-',2) AS PTPNAMEA , SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_Z , '/', 1)||'-'||SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_Z , '/', 2),'-',1) AS SYSNAMEZ, SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME_DATA_Z , '/', 2),'-',2) AS PTPNAMEZ FROM( SELECT TRUNK_ID, SPLIT_PART(TRUNK_ID , '--', 1) AS SYSNAME_DATA_A, SPLIT_PART(TRUNK_ID , '--', 2) AS SYSNAME_DATA_Z FROM NIA.TB_ROADM_TRUNK_REPEATER GROUP BY TRUNK_ID )A ), ROADM_OPC_DATA AS ( SELECT A.TRUNK_ID, A.SYSNAME, A.MRSA_SLOT, A.UNIT, A.LAMBDA, GB, A.DROP_ADDRESS FROM( SELECT A.TRUNK_ID, A.SYSNAME, A.MRSA_SLOT, A.UNIT, A.LAMBDA, 'A' AS GB, A.DROP_ADDRESS FROM( SELECT TRUNK_ID, X1.SYSNAME, X1.MRSA_SLOT, X1.UNIT, X1.LAMBDA, X1.DROP_ADDRESS FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_OPC X1 LEFT OUTER JOIN NNI_TOPOLOGY X2 ON (X1.SYSNAME = X2.SYSNAMEA AND X1.MRSA_SLOT = X2.PTPNAMEA) ) A WHERE A.TRUNK_ID IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT A.TRUNK_ID, A.SYSNAME, A.MRSA_SLOT, A.UNIT, A.LAMBDA, 'Z' AS GB, A.DROP_ADDRESS FROM( SELECT TRUNK_ID, X1.SYSNAME, X1.MRSA_SLOT, X1.UNIT, X1.LAMBDA, X1.DROP_ADDRESS FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_OPC X1 LEFT OUTER JOIN NNI_TOPOLOGY X2 ON (X1.SYSNAME = X2.SYSNAMEZ AND X1.MRSA_SLOT = X2.PTPNAMEZ) ) A WHERE A.TRUNK_ID IS NOT NULL ) A ), UNI_TOPOLOGY_A AS ( SELECT TRUNK_ID, SYSNAME, MRSA_SLOT, UNIT, LAMBDA, GB, DROP_ADDRESS FROM ROADM_OPC_DATA WHERE GB = 'A' ), UNI_TOPOLOGY_Z AS ( SELECT TRUNK_ID, SYSNAME, MRSA_SLOT, UNIT, LAMBDA, GB, DROP_ADDRESS FROM ROADM_OPC_DATA WHERE GB = 'Z' ) SELECT DISTINCT A.TRUNK_ID, SPLIT_PART(A.SYSNAME , '-', 1) AS SYSNAMEA, SPLIT_PART(A.DROP_ADDRESS , '-', 1) AS SHELFA, REPLACE(A.DROP_ADDRESS, SPLIT_PART(A.DROP_ADDRESS , '-', 1)||'-','') AS PTPNAMEA , SPLIT_PART(Z.SYSNAME , '-', 1) AS SYSNAMEZ, SPLIT_PART(Z.DROP_ADDRESS , '-', 1) AS SHELFZ, REPLACE(Z.DROP_ADDRESS, SPLIT_PART(Z.DROP_ADDRESS , '-', 1)||'-','') AS PTPNAMEZ FROM UNI_TOPOLOGY_A A LEFT OUTER JOIN UNI_TOPOLOGY_Z Z ON A.TRUNK_ID = Z.TRUNK_ID AND A.LAMBDA = Z.LAMBDA
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_EQUIP_NETWORK (SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU) SELECT SID, AID_BAU, AID_PAU, P_SID, P_AID_BAU, P_AID_PAU FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_NETWORK_YD
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST_YD (TID, SYSNAME, PSU, MODEL, SID, SW_VER, SW_CHKSUM, SW_DATE, SW_TIME) VALUES (#{tid}, #{sysname}, #{psu}, #{model}, #{sid}, #{swVer}, #{swChksum}, #{swDate}, #{swTime})
